observations.summary: Dan's rejection of material abundance as meaningless in the face of death echoes the thematic motif of spiritual ascendance over earthly attachment, reflecting his internal conflict between flesh and spirit.

source_evidence.quote: "Abundance of things?" Dan spat, his voice cracking with brine. "Why devote my life to things I cannot carry into death?"

observations.target_hint: Dan's spiritual journey involves rejecting materialism and embracing higher truths, as seen throughout the narrative context.
